title: It Had To Be You
overview:
It Had to Be You is an American sitcom starring Faye Dunaway and Robert Urich. The series premiered September 19, 1993 on CBS. It centered on Dunaway's character, a Network-like businesswoman, who hires blue-collar Urich to do some carpentry work at her Boston office, and their ensuing romance. Music by Stephen James Taylor.

The theme song was the 1924 hit "It Had to Be You" written by Isham Jones.
creator: Andrew Nicholls

episodes.title: It Had To Be You - Faye Dunaway, Robert Urich
